problem: Why do amyloid plaques form in Alzheimer's and can they be cleared?
hypothesis: Why do amyloid plaques form in Alzheimer's and can they be cleared? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Telomerase. Telomerase activation/inhibition in target cells directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Human organoid model with 14 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
